'''Dithanune''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="CSWE" /> located in the [[Dithanune system/Legends|Dithanune system]], a part of the [[Bortele sector/Legends|Bortele sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> It was [[Homeworld/Legends|home]] to the [[Death/Legends|lethal]] [[Diet/Legends|predator]] known as the [[needle beast]],<ref name="CSWE" /> which the [[Defel/Legends|Defel]] [[Miner/Legends|miner]] and undercover [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Spy/Legends|spy]] and [[Saboteur/Legends|saboteur]] [[Thar'quan]] once encountered by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="CRO">''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Dithanune's name was introduced via a mention of the "Dithanune needle beast" in ''[[Cracken's Rebel Operatives]]'', a [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook published for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. The section mentioning the creature was authored by [[Craig Robert Carey]] with [[J. Michael Denbo]].<ref name="CRO" /> [[2008]]'s ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' subsequently established Dithanune as a distinct planet.<ref name="CSWE" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Dithanune [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square R-8.<ref name="TEA" />
